productDisplayName: Crusoe Men Elixir Boxer Assorted Short
description: CompositionChecked Elixir boxer shorts from crusoe made of mercerised 2ply 100% cotton fabric with Fit-to-hip stitching , elasticated waistband with branding at the centre, buttoned fly, buttoned pocket at the backThis product comes in assorted colours and you may not receive the colour shown in the image Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cold iron as needed Do not dry clean This classic pair of boxers from Crusoe are crafted using soft absorbent cotton that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease.
